articles.title: Cheap, Invisible, Accurate: Hezbollah's Deadly New Weapon Against Israel
articles.description: Israel believes Hezbollah sources the base drones from China or Iran before attaching a grenade or similar explosive device to each one.

articles.title: Kerala Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: UDF eyes comeback as LDF fights to hold ground in Kerala
articles.description: Kerala Election Results 2026 LIVE, Election Commission of India (ECI) Kerala Assembly Election Results Live Vote Counting Updates: The Election Commission of India (ECI) will declare Kerala Assembly Election Results 2026 on May 4, with vote counting starting in the morning and early trends expected soon after.

articles.title: Trump's Iran disaster hands Putin big win: EU reels with weeks of fuel left, Hormuz hell unleashed?
articles.description: Russia capitalizes on the global energy shock triggered by tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, expanding oil exports across Asia and regaining influence in Europe. As prices surge and supplies tighten, Vladimir Putin emerges as a key beneficiary while Donald Trump faces criticism over the Iran strategy’s global fallout. With the European Union scrambling for fuel and Asian demand rising, the crisis is reshaping global energy markets and geopolitical alliances.

articles.title: Israeli military urges residents in southern Lebanon to evacuate amid operations against Hezbollah
articles.description: Israel has continued ⁠to ‌carry out ​strikes across southern Lebanon, ‌and its troops are occupying a strip ‌of the ​country's south.

articles.title: Action sought against sugar factories refusing to comply with govt. order on payment of incentive to farmers
articles.description: MLC Dinesh Gowda urges strict action against non-compliant sugar factories hindering farmers' incentive payments in Karnataka.

articles.title: Kerala assembly elections 2026: From Peravoor, Dharmadam to Palakkad, top 10 seats to watch out
articles.description: Kerala's political fate hangs in the balance as vote counting for the April 9 Assembly elections begins. The ruling LDF, opposition UDF, and BJP-led NDA are vying for dominance in a high-stakes contest. Exit polls suggest a close fight, with the UDF aiming to unseat the LDF after a decade.

articles.title: Assam assembly elections 2026: From Jalukbari, Jorhat to Kaliabor, here are top 10 seats to watch out
articles.description: Assam assembly elections key seats: The final stage of the Assam election battle arrives with vote counting on Monday. This will decide if the BJP-led NDA secures a third term or if the Congress returns to power. The fates of 722 candidates from 126 constituencies are sealed in EVMs. Counting will occur at 40 centres across all 35 districts under tight security.

articles.title: West Bengal elections: TMC dares BJP to bring full force ahead of fresh poll in Falta
articles.description: TMC challenges BJP to bring full force for Falta's fresh elections after severe electoral offences led to polling cancellation.

articles.title: Puducherry assembly elections 2026: From Thattanchavady to Mangalam, here are top 10 seats to watch out
articles.description: Puducherry's 2026 Assembly elections are a tight race with a record 89.83% voter turnout. Exit polls project a victory for the AINRC-led NDA, though actor Vijay's TVK is also in contention. Key constituencies feature high-profile candidates, including the incumbent CM and former CM, in closely watched contests.

articles.title: Baloch Women Forum on disappearance of two women in Kech district
articles.description: The Baloch Women Forum voiced serious concern over the enforced disappearance of two women from Kech district, stating it spreads "fear and distress." The women were reportedly detained during a late-night raid and their whereabouts are unknown.

articles.title: West Bengal Election Results 2026: Date, Time, Where to Check WB Assembly Results
articles.description: West Bengal Election Results 2026: Check date, time, ECI result link, where to check WB Assembly results and live counting updates.

articles.title: West Bengal polls: BJP candidates seek divine blessings before results
articles.description: Ahead of the West Bengal Assembly election 2026 vote counting, BJP candidates including Purnima Chakraborty and Sital Kapat visited temples to offer prayers. They expressed confidence in winning and forming a government under PM Modi's leadership.

articles.title: Vinesh flags fear of bias, says govt to be responsible for any incident in Gonda
Nepal govt sacks over 1,500 appointees in major administrative shake-up: Report
articles.description: President Ramchandra Paudel on Saturday issued the “Ordinance on Special Provisions for the Removal of Public Office Bearers, 2083” on the recommendation of the council of ministers, triggering widespread disruptions across Nepal’s administrative, health and education sectors, according to The Kathmandu Post newspaper.

articles.title: TMC cries foul play outside counting centre at Mamata Banerjee’s Constituency Bhabanipur, claims entry of BJP-flagged car on premises
articles.description: Trinamool Congress has accused the Bharatiya Janata Party of foul play in Bhabanipur after TMC workers alleged that two vehicles bearing BJP flags were allowed into the compound housing EVMs.

articles.title: Parliamentary forum discussion needed for Great Nicobar projects, says Congress
articles.description: Congress calls for parliamentary debate on Great Nicobar projects, citing ecological, tribal rights, and transparency concerns amid government response.

articles.title: West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026 | Ruckus outside counting centre in Mamata Banerjee's constituency
articles.description: Bengal Politics: Tensions rise in Bhabanipur as TMC and BJP dispute over strongroom security ahead of West Bengal assembly vote count.

articles.title: ‘India lacks museum-going culture’: Nithin Kamath praises Kolkata museum, urges Indians to explore heritage
articles.description: After visiting Kolkata’s Victoria Memorial and Indian Museum, Zerodha co-founder Nithin Kamath said India lacks a strong museum-going culture, sparking a wider conversation on heritage tourism and public engagement with history.

articles.title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026 | Biryani, laddoos prepared as parties gear up for result day celebrations
articles.description: Kerala Election Results 2026: UDF, LDF, and BJP gear up for counting day celebrations with biryani and laddoos as Kerala awaits its next government on May 4.

articles.title: ‘If they misbehave...’: Trump's fresh warning for Iran as he reviews peace proposal
articles.description: The warning came after Iran's Tasnim and Fars news agencies reported that Tehran had sent a 14-point proposal to mediator Pakistan.

articles.title: India's island territories provide military deterrence against expansionist China
articles.description: Today, an average of 6-7 PLA ships are in the Indian Ocean Region each month with aircraft carrier based task forces entering the region within this decade.

articles.title: Strong India needs tribals in mainstream for global good: Mohan Bhagwat
articles.description: RSS chief Mohan Bhagwat, at a Mumbai event, said a strong India needs to integrate tribal communities. He honoured teachers from Ekal Vidyalayas, which Nitin Gadkari guides, for their work in spreading education and development in tribal areas.

articles.title: BJP's Dilip Ghosh hails ECI's repoll order for Falta constituency
articles.description: BJP leader Dilip Ghosh welcomed the ECI's decision for a complete repoll in West Bengal's Falta assembly constituency on May 21, stating it upholds the democratic rights of people who were previously prevented from voting.

articles.title: Iran war live: Iranian supertanker carrying $220M of oil evades US blockade, says tracker
articles.description: US President Donald Trump says he will “soon be reviewing the plan Iran has just sent to us”, but does not think he can make a deal

articles.title: Election Results 2026: Where and how to download full PDF, seat-wise data for West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Puducherry, Kerala, Assam
articles.description: Election Results 2026: The counting of votes for five assemblies, West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Puducherry, Kerala and Assam, will be taken up on May 4, 2026.

articles.title: 'It's an American problem': Man says 300 job applications were rejected until he used Indian surname
articles.description: A job seeker claimed he received no responses after sending over 300 applications. He said that after changing his surname to “Singh” on his resume, he quickly got responses.

articles.title: Assembly Elections Result 2026: High-Profile Seats To Watch On May 4 Across 4 States, Puducherry
articles.description: Key Assembly seats in West Bengal, Assam, Tamil Nadu, Kerala and Puducherry will decide May 4 results, with BJP, TMC, DMK, AIADMK, LDF, UDF, TVK all in contention.

articles.title: Trump Warns US Could Relaunch Iran Strikes If Tehran ‘Misbehaves’
articles.description: US President Trump warned military strikes on Iran could resume if Tehran “misbehaves,” despite a new diplomatic proposal being reviewed to end the ongoing conflict. The proposed deal addresses sanctions and Iran’s nuclear program, but significant disagreements are slowing progress.

articles.title: Assembly Election Results 2026 date & counting time: Full schedule for West Bengal, Assam, Kerala, Tamil Nadu, and Puducherry
articles.description: Assembly Election Results 2026 date and time: West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Assam, and Puducherry await their Assembly election results on May 4th. Vote counting begins at 8 AM, with initial trends expected within two hours. High voter turnouts were recorded across states, setting the stage for crucial contests, including the direct face-off in West Bengal and the UDF vs. LDF battle in Kerala.

articles.title: Kashmir belongs to all, bring Pandits back home: Farooq Abdullah
articles.description: Farooq Abdullah urged the return of Kashmiri Pandits, calling their exodus the valley's 'biggest loss'. Concurrently, J&K LG Manoj Sinha announced a major campaign against narco-terrorism, linking the drug trade directly to regional militancy.

articles.title: Tariq Anwar slams 'Modi Tattva' in Vadodara university syllabus
articles.description: Congress leader Tariq Anwar criticised MSU Vadodara's decision to add 'Modi Tattva' to its syllabus, calling it 'unfortunate'. The university defended the addition, saying it's part of a new course on the 'Sociology of Patriotism'.

articles.description: Kavitha Kavitha criticized her father's BRS government for poor policies, irrigation failures, and unemployment issues, vowing to prioritize women's leadership in her new party.

articles.description: According to the election affidavit uploaded on the state election commission’s website, she did her masters in political science from KU in 1981 and M.Ed from the same university in 1983

articles.description: In a 5.56-minute video, Kuldeep Bishnoi said that BJP state president Mohan Lal Badoli addressed his father and former CM Bhajan Lal Ji disrespectfully, and MP Rekha Sharma insulted his father with controversial remarks

articles.title: Awareness rally on May 5 for National Lok Adalat
articles.description: Kanpur Bar Association to hold May 5 car rally to promote National Lok Adalat on May 9 at Kanpur Nagar courts, urging citizens to settle cases by consent.

articles.title: Election Commission releases final data: 4.88 crore people voted in Tamil Nadu
articles.description: Tamil Nadu witnessed a record 85.1% voter turnout in the recent assembly elections, with 4.88 crore citizens casting their ballots. Women voters significantly outnumbered men, continuing a trend from previous years. The Election Commission faced delays in releasing data but assured robust security and transparency for the upcoming vote counting on May 4.

articles.title: Central agencies misused to defeat TMC in Bengal: Congress's Anwar
articles.description: Congress's Tariq Anwar alleged central agencies were misused in West Bengal to defeat TMC. The Supreme Court declined to direct on a TMC plea against using only central staff for vote counting, which Anwar also criticised as 'wrong and regrettable'.

articles.title: West Bengal elections: Ahead of counting, TMC & BJP spar over EVM security
articles.description: Ahead of Bengal's vote counting, Trinamool and BJP traded accusations over EVM strongroom security. TMC alleged CCTV blackouts in North 24 Parganas, while BJP pointed to alleged unauthorized access and attempted breaches in Salt Lake and Burdwan. Both parties raised concerns about the integrity of the storage facilities.

articles.title: Over rising salaries of actors and directors, Tamil film Producers call strike, ask for revenue-sharing model
articles.description: A token strike called by the Tamil Film Producers’ Council on May 2, 2026 has sparked a strong debate within the Tamil film industry.

articles.title: Police arrest history-sheeter & juvenile for stealing jewellery in Chennai’s Vyasarpadi
